case_title: MADELINE STILLEY ET AL VS. LI WEN BU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-108) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT BU, LI WEN
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STILLEY, MADELINE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BU, LI WEN
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STILLEY, MADELINE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,050.00 FILED BY STILLEY, MADELINE BROWN, MARJORIE AS TO DEFENDANT BU, LI WEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS MADELINE STILLEY AND MARJORIE BROWN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LI WEN BU WITH WITNESS JOSE JIMENEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STILLEY, MADELINE BROWN, MARJORIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BU, LI WEN $5,708.90 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,883.90, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000.00 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(C). DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,433.90, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, MARJORIE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED OCT-15-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BU, LI WEN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108A). THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
